prompt: A dramatic commercial anime poster for a fictional energy drink brand, in a black, crimson red, and white limited palette with explosive contrast. The composition is vertical and densely layered like a Japanese street poster. In the foreground, a chibi-goth anime girl with a short blunt bob, pale skin, oversized round goggles with glowing red lenses, and a dark oversized hoodie faces forward and holds a tall black energy drink can close to the viewer in her right hand. Her hoodie has cat-themed details and small accessories, and she is surrounded by hand-drawn white doodle line art: exactly 6 cat faces or cat characters, exactly 4 bats, exactly 4 stars, exactly 2 hearts, and several lightning scribbles and spark marks. The can is black with red accents and a cat logo, labeled in bold English text: "NEKON ENERGY" and "BLACK SHOCK". In the midground and background, a ruined futuristic city canyon stretches inward toward a bright red blast of energy at the center. A lone back-facing human silhouette stands in the center of the street before the explosion, framed by jagged skyscrapers and red shockwave streaks. At the top center, huge distressed white Japanese headline text dominates the poster: 本能、覚醒。. Beneath it, smaller white Japanese subheading text reads: 闇を切り裂き、限界を超えろ。. In the upper left, create a vertical feature list with 3 benefit blocks, each with a small white icon and Japanese copy. The first block has a lightning-style icon and the heading "最強のエナジー" with smaller text "カフェイン160mg アルギニン配合". The second block has a cat-face icon and the heading "集中力ブースト" with smaller text "ガラナとビタミン群で 脳を覚醒". The third block has a heart icon and the heading "疲労回復サポート" with smaller text "クエン酸＆必須アミノ酸で リカバリー". In the top right, place the white logo text Pollo.ai. At the bottom, add a massive white Japanese slogan: 黒の衝撃、全開。. Directly below it, set the product name in bold italic red capitals: NEKON ENERGY BLACK SHOCK. Add a small white Japanese footer line centered beneath: "闇を味方に、未来を掴め。". In the lower right corner, place a red paint-splatter badge with black and white Japanese text reading "エナジー売上 No.1 ※自社調べ". The overall style mixes gritty cyberpunk apocalypse illustration, manga key art, and rough white marker doodles over a highly rendered red-black cityscape, with cracked texture on the large typography, cinematic lighting, aggressive depth, and premium commercial poster design.
